why: $1,800 SendGrid email credits — cloud email delivery with 99.9% uptime, use code DEVDEALS

name: Zendesk
desc: Zendesk offers 6 months free of Support Suite and Sell Suite through devdeals.org. Customer service platform with ticketing, live chat, AI agents, and CRM functionality. Includes omnichannel support and automation tools. Use code DEVDEALS at signup.
why: 6 months free Zendesk Support + Sell — ticketing, live chat, AI agents, use code DEVDEALS

name: Loom
desc: Loom offers 25 Business seats for 1 year through a special partnership. Async video messaging platform with recording, transcription, comments, and viewer insights. Business tier includes HD video, custom branding, and team analytics. Use code SU25DEEL at signup.
why: 25 Business seats for 1 year — async video messaging with HD recording, use code SU25DEEL

name: Brevo
desc: Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) offers 75% off the annual Premium plan through devdeals.org. All-in-one marketing platform with email campaigns, SMS, chat, CRM, and automation. Premium tier includes unlimited contacts, advanced segmentation, and A/B testing. Use code DEVDEALS at signup.
why: 75% off annual Brevo Premium — all-in-one marketing with email, SMS, CRM, use code DEVDEALS

name: Canva
desc: Canva offers 20% off Pro annual plan. Graphic design platform with drag-and-drop editor, millions of templates, stock photos, and brand kits. Pro tier includes background removal, brand management, and team collaboration. Use code CANVASECRET20 at signup.
why: 20% off Canva Pro annual — graphic design with millions of templates, use code CANVASECRET20

name: GitHub Copilot Free
desc: AI code completion and chat assistant. Free tier includes 2,000 code completions per month and 50 chat messages per month. Supports VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim, and other IDEs. No credit card required.
why: 2,000 free completions + 50 chat messages/month — industry-standard AI coding assistant, no credit card needed

name: Bruno
desc: Open-source API client for testing REST, GraphQL, and WebSocket APIs. Git-native collaboration, offline-first, with collection-level authentication and pre-request scripts. No account required. MIT licensed.
why: Free open-source Postman alternative — Git-native, offline-first, no account needed

name: Coolify
desc: Open-source self-hostable Platform-as-a-Service. Deploy Docker containers, static sites, Node.js, Python, PHP, and more via git push. Built-in auto SSL, reverse proxy, database provisioning, and monitoring. Requires your own VPS (~$5-10/mo). AGPL licensed.
why: Free self-hosted Heroku/Vercel alternative — deploy anything via git push on your own VPS

name: Appwrite Cloud
desc: Open-source Backend-as-a-Service with authentication, database, storage, and serverless functions. Free cloud tier includes 75,000 monthly active users, 2 GB storage, 750,000 function executions, and 5 GB bandwidth. No credit card required.
why: 75K MAU free BaaS — Firebase alternative with auth, database, storage, and functions

name: Umami
desc: Open-source privacy-focused web analytics platform. Self-hosted with a simple JS snippet. No cookie banners required, GDPR-compliant by design. Track page views, events, sessions, and custom metrics. MIT licensed. Also offers hosted cloud option at umami.is.
why: Free open-source Google Analytics alternative — privacy-first, no cookie banner needed

name: Cal.com
desc: Open-source scheduling infrastructure. Free cloud tier includes unlimited event types, unlimited calendar connections, team scheduling, and customizable booking pages. Self-hostable version also available. AGPLv3 licensed.
why: Free open-source Calendly alternative — unlimited event types, self-hostable

name: Grafana Cloud Free
desc: Full-stack observability platform with Grafana dashboards. Free tier includes 10,000 active series metrics (14-day retention), 50 GB logs, 50 GB traces (7-day retention), and 3 team members. Built-in alerting, on-call management, and incident response. No credit card required.
why: 10K metric series + 50GB logs + 50GB traces free — full-stack observability at zero cost

name: Ollama
desc: Run large language models locally with a simple CLI and API. Supports 100+ models including Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, Phi, and Qwen. OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. No cloud dependency, no rate limits, fully offline. Mac, Linux, and Windows. MIT licensed.
why: Run 100+ LLMs locally for free — fully offline, no rate limits, OpenAI-compatible API

name: CodeRabbit
desc: AI-powered code review platform. Free tier includes 15 PR reviews per month with inline suggestions across GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket.
why: 15 free AI code reviews/month -- automated PR review saves hours per sprint

name: Replit
desc: Online IDE with built-in hosting and databases. Free Starter gives 3 public repls and 100 compute hours/month.
why: 100 free compute hours/month -- instant online IDE for prototyping without setup

name: PagerDuty
desc: Incident management and alerting platform. Free tier includes 5 users, basic alert scheduling, and 2 notification channels.
why: Free for 5 users -- incident alerting and on-call scheduling for dev teams

name: Codeium
desc: AI-powered code autocomplete and chat. Free tier for individuals gives unlimited autocompletions and basic chat across 70+ IDEs. No credit card required.
why: Free unlimited AI autocomplete in 70+ IDEs -- Copilot alternative with zero cost for individuals

name: ZenCall
desc: AI phone agents that capture leads 24/7 in 16 languages with 7,000+ integrations.
why: Pay  once vs. /mo for Aircall — AI phone agents in 16 languages at lifetime pricing

name: Incogniton
desc: Multi-account browser profile management with antidetect technology for secure online operations.
why: Pay  once vs. /mo for GoLogin — multi-account browser management at lifetime price

name: Rezi
desc: AI-powered resume builder that creates ATS-friendly resumes and tailors them to specific job descriptions.
why: AI resume builder at lifetime pricing — create ATS-optimized resumes without monthly fees

name: GitHub for Startups
desc: Eligible early-stage startups get 20 seats of GitHub Enterprise free for 12 months plus $10,000 in flexible platform credits for Copilot, Advanced Security, Actions, and more.
why: Covers engineering tooling for small teams — Enterprise, Copilot, and Advanced Security for a year without the usual seat cost.

name: PostHog for Startups
desc: Product analytics, session replay, feature flags, surveys, and error tracking in one platform. Early-stage startups can apply for $50,000 in startup credits on top of the generous free tier.
why: Best-in-class product analytics suite for early-stage startups — $50K credits make it effectively free while you grow.

name: MongoDB Atlas Startup Program
desc: MongoDB Atlas startup credits for managed document database hosting on AWS, GCP, or Azure. Credits apply to paid Atlas tiers and include technical advisor support.
why: Separate high-value startup credit program on top of the existing Atlas free tier.

name: Neon
desc: Serverless Postgres with 100 projects, 100 CU-hours per project/month, branching, instant provisioning, and scale-to-zero compute. No credit card required.
why: Best serverless Postgres free tier for modern stacks — branch per PR, scale to zero, no credit card required.
